landing.tribes.overworldDesc: Defenders of the light. Masters of strategy and elemental balance.
landing.tribes.underworldDesc: Conquerors of shadow. Raw power fueled by fire and darkness.
landing.tribes.mipedianDesc: Desert phantoms. Invisible strikers wielding wind and deception.
landing.tribes.danianDesc: The hive endures. Strength in numbers, unified by earth.

faq.title: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.subtitle: INTEL DATABASE — CLEARANCE LEVEL: PUBLIC
faq.footer: KNOWLEDGE BASE v1.0 — ALL DATA VERIFIED
faq.gettingStarted.a1: Chaotic is a digital trading card game where you collect Creatures, Battlegear, Mugic, Attacks, and Locations. Explore the world of Perim, build decks, and battle other players in the Dromes.
faq.gettingStarted.a2: Log in with Discord, choose your tribe allegiance, and open your starter pack. You'll receive creatures, battlegear, mugic, attacks, and locations to build your first deck.
faq.gettingStarted.a3: The Dromes are the battle arenas where players compete. From the Dromes hub you can challenge players, enter ranked matchmaking, spectate live games, and access your collection.
faq.scanning.q1: How do I get new cards?
faq.scanning.a1: Travel to Perim locations and start scanquests. When the timer completes, you'll receive a card reward. Rarer locations and higher familiarity give better odds of rare cards.
faq.scanning.a2: Each scan at a location increases your familiarity with it. Higher familiarity means better stat bonuses on creature cards found there. Familiarity uses diminishing returns — early scans count more.
faq.scanning.a3: Adventures are story events that can trigger during scanquests. They involve skill checks and battles with unique rewards. Some adventures form quest chains that unlock sequentially.
faq.deckBuilding.q1: How do I build a deck?
faq.deckBuilding.a1: When a battle starts, you'll enter the Deck Building phase. Place up to 6 creatures on the battlefield (1 back, 2 mid, 3 front), assign battlegear and mugic, then select 20 attack cards and 10 locations.
faq.deckBuilding.a2: Combat is turn-based. Each turn you move a creature, then engage an enemy. In combat, play attack cards using elemental damage. Creatures fight until one reaches 0 energy. Mugic can be cast for powerful effects.
faq.deckBuilding.a3: After each attack, the defender gets a chance to respond (Burst). You can play attacks back and forth until both players pass. This adds a layer of strategy to each combat exchange.
faq.tribes.a1: OverWorld (strategy/balance), UnderWorld (raw power/fire), Mipedian (stealth/wind), and Danian (swarm/earth). Each tribe has unique creatures, mugic, and playstyles.
faq.tribes.a2: Four elements — Fire, Air, Earth, Water — determine attack effectiveness. Creatures can channel one or more elements. Attacks deal damage in specific elements, and creatures without that element take reduced damage.
faq.tribes.q3: Can I use cards from other tribes?
faq.tribes.a3: Yes! Your tribe allegiance determines your starter cards and some bonuses, but you can collect and use cards from any tribe. Some mugic and battlegear are Generic (usable by all tribes).
faq.profiles.a1: Codemasters are powerful AI bosses. Defeat them in the League to earn badges displayed on your profile. Defeating all Codemasters grants legendary status.
faq.profiles.q2: How does the ranked system work?
faq.profiles.a2: Ranked matches use an Elo rating system (starting at 1200). Win to gain rating, lose to drop. Every 8 ranked wins earns a Codemaster challenge attempt. The leaderboard tracks top players.
faq.profiles.a3: Achievements are earned by completing specific goals — winning battles, collecting cards, exploring locations, and more. Some achievements are hidden until unlocked. Check your profile to track progress.

tribeSelect.subtitle: SELECT A TRIBE TO BEGIN YOUR JOURNEY IN PERIM
tribeSelect.tribes.overworld.name: OVERWORLD
tribeSelect.tribes.overworld.desc: Guardians of order and light. OverWorld creatures excel in balanced stats and elemental versatility. Masters of Water and Earth.
tribeSelect.tribes.underworld.name: UNDERWORLD
tribeSelect.tribes.underworld.desc: Conquerors forged in shadow. UnderWorld creatures wield devastating Fire attacks and raw Power. Strength through destruction.
tribeSelect.tribes.mipedian.name: MIPEDIAN
tribeSelect.tribes.mipedian.desc: Desert phantoms who strike unseen. Mipedian creatures use Air and stealth — Invisibility, Warbeasts, and blinding Speed.
tribeSelect.tribes.danian.name: DANIAN
tribeSelect.tribes.danian.desc: The hive endures. Danian creatures use Earth and their Mandiblor swarm — Hive tactics, infection, and unbreakable unity.

news.battle.0.headline: {player:0} emerges victorious against {player:1}

news.battle.1.headline: {player:0} defeats {player:1} in the Dromes
news.battle.1.body: After {extra:turns} turns of combat, {player:0} claimed victory. The Dromes grow silent as the dust settles.
news.battle.2.headline: Victory for {player:0} over {player:1}
news.battle.2.body: The battle raged for {extra:turns} turns before {player:0} emerged triumphant. Perim watches with interest.
news.discovery.0.headline: Intelligence from {location:0}: rare {creature:1} sighted
news.discovery.0.body: {player:2} uncovered a rare {creature:1} while scanning at {location:0}. Collectors take note.
news.discovery.1.headline: Rare scan at {location:0}: {creature:1}
news.discovery.1.body: Field operative {player:2} confirmed a {creature:1} sighting near {location:0}. Codex updated.
news.achievement.0.headline: {player:0} earned: {extra:achievement}

news.achievement.1.headline: Achievement unlocked: {extra:achievement}

news.player_report.0.body: {player:2} transmitted from {location:0}: {extra:body}. All operatives in the region stay alert.
